summary: Completed backend testing of PDF Export feature. All 10 tests passed (100%). All three PDF endpoints working correctly: weekly report PDF (4275 bytes), monthly report PDF (2527 bytes), and public preview PDF (3067 bytes). All PDFs have valid %PDF-1.4 signatures, correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers.
passed_tests: Weekly PDF returns valid PDF with Content-Type application/pdf
Weekly PDF has correct Content-Disposition header with filename
Weekly PDF starts with %PDF-1.4 signature (4275 bytes)
Monthly PDF returns valid PDF (2527 bytes)
Monthly PDF 404 error has appropriate detail message
Public PDF returns valid PDF (3067 bytes)
Public PDF smaller than full report (3067 < 4275)
Weekly PDF has proper EOF marker
PDF is valid binary format with %PDF-1.4 header
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation using ReportLab working correctly
Content-Type headers correctly set to application/pdf
PDF files have valid %PDF signature and EOF marker
Public preview endpoint correctly accessible without auth
Proper 404 handling when reports don't exist
test_credentials: None required - endpoints tested without auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Export feature fully tested. Three endpoints: GET /api/reports/weekly-winning-products/pdf (returns 4275 bytes), GET /api/reports/monthly-market-trends/pdf (returns 2527 bytes), GET /api/reports/public/weekly-winning-products/pdf (returns 3067 bytes, no auth required). All return valid PDF-1.4 format with correct headers. PDF generator service at /app/backend/services/pdf_generator.py uses ReportLab with ViralScout branding.
